name: Ascendrite Conceptual Knowledge Graph
description: Semantic model of core engineering and mathematical concepts, mappings, and prerequisite paths.

nodes.name: Vector Space
nodes.description: A mathematical structure formed by a collection of vectors, satisfying closure and linear axioms.

nodes.name: Eigendecomposition
nodes.description: Decomposition of a square matrix into eigenvalues and eigenvectors, mapping diagonalizing scales.

nodes.name: Singular Value Decomposition (SVD)
nodes.description: Factorization of a real or complex matrix, generalizing eigendecomposition to non-square matrices.

nodes.name: Gradient Descent
nodes.description: First-order iterative optimization algorithm for finding the local minimum of a differentiable function.

nodes.name: Cross Entropy
nodes.description: A measure of the difference between two probability distributions over the same set of events.

nodes.name: Kullback-Leibler (KL) Divergence
nodes.description: A measure of how one probability distribution differs from a reference probability distribution.

nodes.name: MLE vs MAP Estimation
nodes.description: Methods of estimating parameters of probability distributions: Maximum Likelihood vs Maximum A Posteriori incorporating prior beliefs.

nodes.name: Networking Models (OSI & TCP/IP)
nodes.description: Layered protocol stack definitions standardizing communication boundaries from physical signals to application layers.

nodes.name: Subnetting and CIDR
nodes.description: Mechanisms dividing IP address blocks into logical segments using subnet masks and Classless Inter-Domain Routing.

nodes.name: MAC Address Learning
nodes.description: Layer-2 bridge mapping dynamic loop building to forward frame traffic strictly using MAC identifiers.

nodes.name: Encapsulation
nodes.description: Bundling of data and methods operating on that data within a class, hiding internal implementation details.

nodes.name: Polymorphism
nodes.description: Provision of a single interface to entities of different types, mapping run-time method resolution.

nodes.name: SOLID Design Principles
nodes.description: Five design principles mapping clean object-oriented architecture and code maintainability standards.

nodes.name: Event Loop
nodes.description: Concurrency model in run-time environments orchestrating asynchronous non-blocking callback executions.

nodes.name: Virtual DOM
nodes.description: In-memory representation of real DOM layout synchronized via reconciliation processes to optimize client-side rendering.
